headings: E.4 SAFETY POLICY ON DRUGS, ALCOHOL, AND OTHER PROHIBITED ITEMS:
text: This section provides the purpose and statement of our Safety Policy on Drugs, Alcohol, and Other Prohibited Items. In it, we define important terms; give specific rules; discuss the Company's rights with  regard  to  testing,  searching,  and  inspecting  persons  and  property;  and  warn  employees, subcontractors,  and  suppliers  of  the  penalties  of  breaking  those  rules.  Also  described  are  the conditions under which prescription drugs may be used.
